arts.ttl: Former Manchester United coach Mike Phelan off to Wayne Rooney’s Plymouth
arts.sum: Veteran coach reunited with former Old Trafford star Argyle languishing in 22nd place in Championship The Plymouth manager Wayne Rooney has drafted in the former Manchester United coach Mike Phelan as he attempts to drag the club out of the Championship relegation zone. The 62-year-old, who spent nine years coaching at Old Trafford in two spells, the first of them under Sir Alex Ferguson, has been appointed as the assistant head coach following the departure of Pete Shuttleworth.
